description: User scrolls down the page to view more calculator options

description: User clicks on the 'Estimate refinance savings' link

description: Page navigates to the Refinance Calculator tool

description: User scrolls down to view the calculator inputs and initial results

description: User pauses to review the calculated monthly repayment amount of $3,196

description: User hovers over the information icon next to 'My current rate'
